forceScanTooltip: Scan the root object hierarchy for materials
noMaterials: No materials found. Drop a GameObject in the Root Object field and scan again.
rescanTexturesTooltip: Scan the root object hierarchy for textures
noTextures: No textures found. Drop a GameObject or Material in the Root Object field and scan again.
noRootObject: Drop a GameObject or Material in the Root Object field above to begin.
inspectSelectedTooltip: Switch to Texture Mode for selected materials
cloneSelectedTooltip: Clone selected items as new assets
replaceSelectedTooltip: Replace selected items with the batch target
resetSelectedTooltip: Reset selected items to their originals
bseNoSMR: Assign an Avatar Root and a SkinnedMeshRenderer above to begin.
bseNoAnimatorMsg: The selected GameObject has no Animator. Animation paths may be incorrect. Continue anyway?
bseSMRNotInRoot: The SkinnedMeshRenderer must be a child of the Avatar Root.
bseResetDefaultConfirm: Reset all blendshapes to the values they had when the renderer was first assigned?
bseNoneMatched: No blendshapes match the current filter.
bseExportSaveMsg: Select a location to save the animation.
bseExportNothing: No blendshapes match the current export mode.
bseImportOverlayDesc: Keep existing values; only overwrite blendshapes present in the clip.
bseImportResetZeroDesc: Set all blendshapes to 0, then apply the clip.
bseImportResetDefaultDesc: Reset to default (scan-time) values, then apply the clip.
bseImportCustomDesc: Choose which source blendshapes to import.
